northlane.title: Northlane MedCare Growth Overhaul
northlane.subtitle: How a healthcare brand scaled qualified inbound traffic through an SEO + content engine built for intent.
northlane.challenge: Northlane had steady branded traffic but weak visibility for high-intent topics. The site architecture diluted authority and most pages failed to convert clinical decision-makers.
strategy: Built a topic cluster model around service-line intent
Reworked information architecture for semantic depth
Created conversion-led landing content with stronger proof
execution: Month 1: technical cleanup, keyword map, and content brief system
Month 2-3: pillar page rollout with supporting articles and schema
Month 4-5: CRO iteration on high-traffic pages and internal linking
outcomes: Meaningful rank lift for core non-branded keywords
Higher lead quality from organic compared to paid channels
Clear editorial operating model the team can scale
northlane.quote: For the first time, SEO felt tied to revenue instead of vanity graphs.

nexa.title: Nexa Commerce Conversion Redesign
nexa.subtitle: How a full checkout and product-page redesign improved trust, clarity, and conversion rate at scale.
nexa.challenge: Nexa had strong acquisition but leaked users in the middle of the funnel. Product pages lacked trust signals and checkout created friction across mobile sessions.
strategy: Mapped user hesitation points with session data and heatmaps
Reframed product communication around value and proof
Simplified checkout flow and reduced cognitive load
Introduced experiment framework for rapid conversion testing
execution: Week 1-2: UX audit, analytics deep dive, and design hypotheses
Week 3-5: component redesign, copy rewrite, and prototype validation
Week 6-8: staged rollout, A/B validation, and iteration
outcomes: Higher checkout completion on both desktop and mobile
Improved average order value from clearer bundle presentation
Reusable design system for future campaign landing pages
nexa.quote: The redesign paid for itself in weeks. Conversion gains were immediate and consistent.

voltica.title: Voltica SaaS Acquisition Reset
voltica.subtitle: How a re-architected paid funnel and landing journey cut CAC while improving trial quality.
voltica.challenge: Voltica was spending aggressively, but trial quality was inconsistent and CAC kept climbing. Messaging varied across channels and landing pages did not match ad intent.
strategy: Consolidated campaign structure around ICP segments
Aligned ad messaging with segment-specific landing pages
Introduced intent filters before trial submission
Shifted budget dynamically based on pipeline-quality signals
execution: Week 1-2: account restructure and persona-level message matrix
Week 3-4: landing system launch and conversion tracking hardening
Week 5-6: creative rotation and budget reallocation by quality
outcomes: Lower CAC without sacrificing qualified volume
Sales team reported better-fit leads entering demo stage
A clear paid media playbook for quarterly scaling
voltica.quote: We stopped buying random trials and started generating real pipeline.

footer.tagline: Premium digital agency for websites, campaigns, and measurable growth.

s1.title: 1. Data Controller
s1.body: ArikDigital is responsible for processing personal data on this website. You can contact us at emirhan.arik38@outlook.de.

s2.title: 2. Data We Collect
s2.body: We process data you voluntarily submit through forms, email, or booking tools, as well as technical usage data such as IP address, browser type, and access times.

s3.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
s3.body: Data is processed to handle inquiries, provide our services, organize appointments, and ensure the technical security of this website.

s4.title: 4. Legal Bases
s4.body: Processing is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (pre-contractual measures), Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR (legal obligations), and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interests).

s5.title: 5. Storage Period
s5.body: We keep personal data only as long as needed for the stated purposes or as required by law.

s6.title: 6. Your Rights
s6.body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

s7.title: 7. Notice
s7.body: This text is a general template and does not constitute legal advice. For a fully compliant policy, we recommend a review by legal counsel.
